creator: fredo.perez0424@gmail.com
text:
+++ This bug was initially created as a clone of Bug #250129 +++

When I run nautilus 3.36.3 on FreeBSD, I get this error:

(org.gnome.Nautilus:1404): GLib-GIO-ERROR **: 20:27:19.732: Settings schema 'org.freedesktop.Tracker.Miner.Files' is not installed

Installing sysutils/tracker-miners does not help.
